transcript.text:
[Boss Tzu at her restaurant today]
[Getting a recommendation for lunch]
[It's a really famous restaurant?!]
[Introducing a hot spot that only the locals know...☆]
[It just melted in my mouth...]
Now you have to take off your belt
[My belt...?]
[This is not enough]
[This is a simple meal]
[We had a big eater as a neighbor...]
[This is Tzuyang's restaurant: Garden Bunsik]
Hello everyone
I'm working at my store today
I've been told there's a very good jokbal (pork trotters) spot nearby
So I'll be going there for lunch
[Chef] -Have you been to the jokbal place? -Yes I have

It's really good, so I go there when I crave jokbal
[Even her chef approves of that restaurant]
So curious I'm going there today
You're eating there today?
I had the regular Hanbang jokbal,
Garlic, and the spicy one
I'm not good with spicy food, so the spicy one was too much for me
So I recommend the standard one and the garlic one You can for sure eat all of it
Thank you very much
[Cooking some tteokboki (spicy rice cake) for the jokbal restaurant owners]
[Scallop, shrimp, squid, green mussels]
[Jjamppong tteokboki] (spicy seafood rice cake)
[Let's see the chef's skills]
[With dijon mustard, whole bacon, and American cheese]
[Deep-fried Monte Cristo Sandwich]
[A Colorful Flying Fish Roe Musubi]

Let's head over because I'm hungry
It's cold
It's been a while since I had jokbal
It's here Very close by
[Garden Bunsik]
[Destination]
[Cho's Jokbal] [Seoul, Dongjak-gu]
Hello~!
I brought this as a gift
Looks delicious
You can have it as a snack later
That looks delish
My favorite
Really? Enjoy~
Thank you!
-Can I have some jokbal here? -Yes

-I like your Jjamppong Tteokboki the best -Really? That's what I brought!
[You know what's up]
Jokbal (Braised Pork Trotters)
Regular, spicy, and honey garlic
Excuse me
Can I get the Hanbang jokbal as a whole?
1 order of that not sliced
1 order of half spicy, half garlic
1 spicy buckwheat noodles
Thank you
[Jokbal in here]
[A delicious looking meaty jokbal]
[Let's make it spicy!]
[Finishing it off with a torch]
[Garlic sauce on top]
[Spicy Jokbal & Honey Garlic Jokbal]

[Whole Jokbal (pork trotters)]
Thank you
[All set up!]
The noodles are not out yet I was going to wait, but...
I can't wait!
Let's take a bite
[Honey Garlic Jokbal]
[No way...]
It just melted in my mouth
That's so good
It's so tender
Full of collagen
I love collagen It's packed with collagen
The meat part is very soft and tender
Good without any dipping sauce
Now the spicy one

I just had the meat part and it's very tender
This is our chef's favorite jokbal spot
I've only heard about this place
I saw this place posted on a blog before as the best
We used to always have a waiting line
[Things have changed since the pandemic]
[We support and root for all small-business owners!]
[Noodles are ready]
The noodles came
Oh thank you
[Some bean sprout soup first!]
Lovely
Their chives are tasty too
Side dishes
We have more side dishes
But you don't eat veggies

Yes, this is fine right here
I have to eat the whole jokbal
So soft and tender
So good
-Thank you -Enjoy your meal
They gave me gloves
Let's eat it as a whole
I've been craving it
As a whole first And then I'll cut it up
Take the mini-jokbal apart
Look at this It looks like a cartoon-meat
Looks very tender, right?
That's so soft
No toughness here It's all tender
The fat and the collagen parts too
It's supposed to be a little tough, but it's not

Cuts right off
Do you see how soft it is?
[How can jokbal be this tender?!]
It's good as it is without ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
Is this forreal?
[How soft is the meat...?]
It won't get cold too fast if I put it like this
Leave that there
Some garlic jokbal this time
Thank you
With the jokbal
[Me...?]
Wait, it's not cut so nevermind
[Now for the spicy]
It's good because the meat itself is good
Lettuce wrap

Chives
It's spicy!
[Precious bean sprout soup...]
Let's try the buckwheat noodles
[They put less amount of vegetables just to fit Tzuyang's preference]
They're the best
Can't eat it by itself
1 piece of jokbal
[What is this sweetness?]
The noodles are jelly-like and chewy
Really delicious
The sauce is sweet & sour
[What are you doing...?]
Do you know what you're going to have for lunch yet?
We should be preparing for our lunch break soon I'll check
You know the Jokbal place next to our restaurant?

I want to give some to our workers because it's so good
Do you think they'll be okay with Jokbal lunch?
That should be fine I'll let them know!
Well then I'll get some orders to-go from here
Excuse me
-How many do you have left? -About 4
Can I buy out the rest?
Yes, if we want to close for the day today
Around how many servings is that?
That should easily feed 10 people
[Order complete]
The buckwheat noodles are tasty
I'll be coming here for lunch from now
This is the garlic one
It's not a spicy kind of garlic
The garlic scent lingers

With a little bit of sweetness and sourness
This is honestly too good
Good thing about getting it as a whole is that it's still warm
Can you see the steam?
These are still warm
[Rip it up!]
[Deadly delicious]
The front leg has a lot of collagen and it's tender
The hind leg has more meat
This one is almost done
A lot of bones left
Let's eat it right
I love the crunchy part right here
Muscle strings?
Done with the garlic one
The garlic jokbal is sweet and addicting

[The to-go orders are ready to go!]
Taking all the bones out
So that it's easier to eat
There's not much left
I wanted a simple meal
Let's pick the bones out
[With your mouth...?]
Shred it up
Shred it into pieces
How can you eat so much and not get fat?
And have such good skin
No, your skin is much better
You're glowing
[Shy]
So pretty
You look prettier in person

Really? Thank you
Hello~!
Hello chef
He's our regular
Really? A regular?
I come here often with our director
[You have good taste...]
This looks heavy
Would you like to go with me?
[Will be back after delivery]
[Delivery complete]
Do you know our chef well?
We were going to grab a drink some time
It's hard to meet up with people because we have different business hours
Not too many chances to talk to people either
A lot of our neighbors became distant too

[We hope that we can all get together again soon after the pandemic!]
[They're getting ready to eat Tzuyang's tteokboki]
Enjoy your meal
-The tteokboki is excellent -Really?
It's just what I like
That's a relief Thank you
[Slow down!]
I should've made it less spicy for you
I love spicy, but I'm just not good at eating it It's okay
Yes, we heard
[How did you know...?]
I'm not too bad at it
I saw you struggling with Jjamppong
This is better than our restaurant's chewy noodles
I'm sorry chef...
Now you have to take off your belt

[My belt...?]
[It's a simple mukbang today~]
Honey garlic sauce on top of the spicy jokbal
[A quick lunch meal finished~!]
Thanks everyone!
I'm ready for the bill now
We give 2,000 Won discount per bag for To-Go orders
No, that's okay!
That's what we do here, it's okay
I hope covid ends soon
[I will be back with more people when it's allowed!]
[We're rooting for all small-business owners!]
[Cheongdam-dong Burger Kim] X [Tzuyang]
Hello!
[Past: Major League Baseball Pitcher] [Current: Burger Kim]
[Handcrafted Burgers Mukbang]

[1 Chicken Patty, 5 Meat Patties, 1 Whole Bacon, 1 Fried Egg]
[AKA 5-Layer Destruction Burger] [Tzuyang takes on the limited-item challenge]
[That thickness]
[Well, it's not bad for Tzuyang...]
Soft on the inside
Crispy on the outside
Can I eat it without the buns?
[Is this... right?]
It's all ruined, right?
Is this possible?
[Boss in the Mirror] [Airing on March 13, Sunday 5PM KBS2]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
